title: Jamie's Wall
values: Just shipped a major update to Waymark! The kanban board now has reject tickets, reporter column, and a directory view. So excited about how this is coming together.
Congrats! The new features look awesome.
Can't wait to try the directory view!
Working on the social template today. The idea is that each Google Sheet becomes a personal wall that you can share with friends.
Check out this article on building apps with vanilla JS — no frameworks needed!
Great read! Vanilla JS is underrated.
Had an amazing dinner tonight. Tried the gluten-free pasta recipe from Mimi's cookbook. Turned out perfect!
What's everyone's favorite productivity tool? Looking for recommendations.
Obsidian for notes, Waymark for everything else.
Feeling grateful for this community. Building things together is the best.
